(1). These regulations may be called the Spices Board Service (Classification, Control and Appeal) Amendment Regulations, 2018. (2). They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Spices Board Service (Classification, Control and Appeal) Regulations, 1992 (hereinafter referred to as the said regulations), in regulation 6, in sub-regulation (1), for the word “Chairman”, the word “Secretary” shall be substituted. 3. In regulation 8, in sub-regulation (1), for the word “Chairman”, the word “Secretary” shall be substituted. 4. In regulation 9, in sub-regulation (1), for the word “Chairman”, the word “Secretary” shall be substituted. 5. In regulation 10, in clause (b) of sub-regulation 8, for the word “Chairman”, the word “Secretary” shall be substituted. 6. In regulation 14, in sub-regulation (1), for the word “Chairman”, the word “Secretary” shall be substituted. 7. In regulation (26), for the word “Chairman”, the word “Secretary” shall be substituted in both the places. 8. In The schedule of the said regulations, the following shall be substituted, namely:- -- 2 of 10 -- [•RFTII-^? 3(i)] ma ^T Jt^m : arorwiT 3 Sl.No 1 I II III IV Description of posts and/or class 2 Group A Posts) All Group B posts All Group C posts All Group D posts Appointing Authority 3 Secretary Secretary Director or Deputy Secretary level officer of Spices Board* Director or Deputy Secretary level officer of Spices Board* Authority Competent to impose penalty and the penalty which it may impose (with reference to item (i) to (ix) in regulation 7) Authority 4 Secretary Secretary Director or Deputy Secretary level officer of Spices Board* Director or Deputy Secretary level officer of Spices Board* Appellate Authority Penalty 5 All All All All 6 Central Government Central Government Secretary Secretary [F.No. 5/10/2016-Plant-D] SANTOSH KUMAR SARANGI, Jt. I ^ M d i T?: y R ^ ^ ^ r ^ R " ^ f # m [W. ^ . 5/10/2016-^TR--#T] -- 4 of 10 -- [ * n r I I - w 3 ( i ) ] W ^T W ^ : 3 M W 5 NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 2nd February, 2018 G.S.R. 157(E).— In exercise of the powers conferred by section 38 of the Spices Board Act, 1986 (10 of 1986), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Spices Board Rules, 1987, namely:- 1. (i) These rules may be called the Spices Board (Amendment) Rules 2018. (ii) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Spices Board Rules, 1987 (hereinafter referred to as the said rules), in rule 4,- (i) in sub-rule (1), for clause (a), the following clause shall be substituted, namely:- “(a) a Chairman shall be appointed by the Central Government ;”. (ii) in sub-rule (1), for clause (d), the following clause shall be substituted, namely:- “(d) six members to represent growers of spices;”. (iii) in sub-rule (1) A, for the word “Chairman”, the word “Secretary” shall be substituted. 3. In rules 6 and 7 of the said rules, for the word “Secretary”, the words “Director or Deputy Secretary level officer of Spices Board” shall be substituted in both the places. 4. In rule 11 of the said rules, in sub-rule (i), in sub-clause (e), for the word “Secretary”, the words “Director or Deputy Secretary level officer of Spices Board” shall be substituted; 5. In rule 11 of the said rules, in sub-rule (2); (a) in clause (i), for sub-clause (a), the following sub-clause shall be substituted, namely:- “The Secretary of the Board who shall be the ex-officio Chairman of the Committee;”; (b) in clause (ii), for sub-clause (a), the following sub-clause shall be substituted, namely:- “The Secretary of the Board who shall be the ex-officio Chairman of the Committee;”; (c) in clause (iii), for sub-clause (a), the following sub-clause shall be substituted, namely:- “The Secretary of the Board who shall be the ex-officio Chairman of the Committee;”; 6. In Chapter III, in the heading, for the words “POWERS AND DUTIES OF CHAIRMAN”, the words “POWERS AND DUTIES OF CHAIRMAN AND SECRETARY” shall be substituted. 7. For rule 14, the following rules shall be substituted, namely:- “14A Powers and duties of the Chairman: (i) the Chairman shall be the head of the Board; (ii) the Chairman shall have power to grant leave to Secretary of the Board; (iii) the Chairman shall preside over the meetings of the Board; accept resignations, if any, of the Board members and he shall also exercise such other powers as may be specified by the Government of India. 14B Powers and duties of the Secretary: The Secretary shall have the following powers and duties :- (i) to grant leave to officers and employees of the Board; (ii) to prescribe duties of all officers and staff of the Board and exercise such supervision and disciplinary control as may be necessary; -- 5 of 10 -- 6 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART I I — S E C . 3(i)] (iii) to sanction expenditure for contingencies, supplies and services and purchase of articles required for the working of the office of the Board; (iv) to require the Board or any Committee thereof to defer taking action in pursuance of any decision taken by the Board or the committee as the case may be pending a reference to the Central Government on such decision; (v) to take decision in respect of matters that cannot wait disposal by the Board or a Committee, as the case may be. The action taken by the Secretary shall be put up to the Board for post facto approval at its next meeting; (vi) to perform such duties as may be delegated to him by the Central Government or the Board or Chairman in accordance with provisions of the Act: Provided that where the Board modifies or reverses the decision taken by the Secretary, such modification or reversion shall be without prejudice to the validity of any action taken before such modification or reversion.”. [F. No. 5/10/2016-Plant-D] SANTOSH KUMAR SARANGI, Jt. Secy. TWT ^ | I N | | | [W.?f.5/10/2016-^FTFf-#T] -- 6 of 10 -- [•RFTII-^1^ 3(i)] "TO ^T JF^m ; amWN fi"4«i : ^ r RR-M^ W T T *TT. w. R 73(3T) di-Ofei: 31 MH=<-0,1992 ^TTT ^r^ra" f¥rr w r «TT Mk * f w T^T ft-/yRrTT/#ifr/01/09, ?nftW: 22 RH<N<, 2009 £PT atfctrr W t S R f^TT ?FTTI NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 2nd February, 2018 G.S.R. 158(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by section 39 of the Spices Board Act, 1986 (10 of 1986), the Spices Board hereby makes the following regulations further to amend the Spices Board (Quality Marking) Regulations, 1992, namely:- 1. (1) These regulations may be called the Spices Board (Quality Marking) Amendment Regulations, 2018. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Spices Board (Quality Marking) Regulations, 1992 (hereinafter referred to as the said regulations), in sub- regulation (12) of regulation 3, for the word “Chairman”, the word “Secretary” shall be substituted. 3. In sub-regulation (5) of regulation 5, for the word “Chairman”, the word “Secretary” shall be substituted. 4. In regulations 6 of the said regulation,- (a) for clause(v), the following clause shall be substituted, namely:- “(v) The following shall be the composition of the Panel of experts for adjudging adequacy of the facilities as reported by the team of the two officers of the Board, namely :- 1 Director or Deputy Secretary level officer, Spices : Chairman Board 2 Director (Marketing), Spices Board or any other : Member officer from the Marketing Department of the Spices Board, as nominated by the Secretary. 3 A scientist of Spices Board nominated by : Member Secretary. 4 A representative of the concerned Export : Member Inspection Agency. 5 A representative of Directorate of Marketing and : Member Inspection The quorum for the panel shall be three.” (b) in clause(vii), for the word “Chairman”, the word “Secretary” shall be substituted. [F. No. 5/10/2016-Plant-D] SANTOSH KUMAR SARANGI, Jt. Secy. WT ^|IN||| [W .tf.5/10/2016-^FTFT- f t ] W R J*TTT HK>ft,#5TP *Tf%^ ft^:- ^ f ^ ^ H W r H T . * f i T . R 1 1 6 ( 3 T ) , dl<0y 26 4)<^(1 1987 ^TTT W T R R f^TT W ^TT 3fR WTT ^TT.W.f^. 816(3T) dl-Citel: 18^R^T2014 ^FT3tf%TT^fTSR"f%Tr'FTTI NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 2nd February, 2018 G.S.R.159(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by Section 38 of the Spices Board Act, 1986 (10 of 1986), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules, further to amend in the Cardamom (Licensing and Marketing) Rules, 1987, namely :- 1. (1). These rules may be called the Cardamom (Licensing & Marketing) (Amendment) Rules, 2018. (2). They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Cardamom (Licensing and Marketing) Rules, 1987, in rule 10,- (a) in clause (m) of sub-rule (1), for the word “Chairman” the word “Secretary” shall be substituted. (b) In clause (g) of sub-rule (2), for the word “Chairman” the word “Secretary” shall be substituted. [F.No. 5/10/2016-Plant-D] SANTOSH KUMAR SARANGI, Jt. Secy. R ^ T 15 if, ^T R^T(1) % FTR RT RyRlRid ^ " - R ^ T TOT ^ l l ^ l l , 3 * ^ : - 'TTRR +I4'RM+ * I R R ' , ^ M ^ f i SR^STR affr R+I-H -HRR' affr WTOT RR^M R+I-H -HRR' # %R?f # STSR-SRT RTRTI *TRR # 3R^rRsrRt if ^RTSTST ^T -HRR-MI # %R?f # 3TSR"«RT RTkTTI TiRR affr ^RTSW # 3RrrfMcT if % R ; # 3TSR"«RT WTOT sfff % RR^TRT ?TT ^T TfRR T^TT RR" srf&RRrt RTRTI " 9. 3rr7 R ^ T % R ^ T 16 if 'tfRR" 3TS? % T^TR RT " R^MI f f # % RR?TRT TT ^T ^f%T T^TT RR' 3Tf&RRf>" ?T^ T?RT [W. t. 5/10/2016-^TR-#T] WfW J*TTT ^TTift, T^TP Hf%^" NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 2nd February, 2018 G.S.R. 160 (E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by section 38 of the Spices Board Act, 1986 (10 of 1986), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Spices Board (Meeting) Rules, 1992, namely:- 1. (1) These rules may be called the Spices Board (Meeting) Amendment Rules 2018. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Spices Board (Meeting) Rule, 1992 (hereinafter referred to as the said rules), in rule 2, for clause (iii), the following clause shall be substituted, namely:- "Chairman" means the Chairman of the Board”. 3. In rule 5 of the said rule, for the word “Secretary”, the word “Director or Deputy Secretary level officer of Spices Board” shall be substituted. 4. In sub-rule (1) and sub-rule (2) of rule 8, for the “Chairman” wherever they occur, the word “Secretary” shall be substituted. 5. In sub-rule (1) of rule 11, for the word “Secretary”, the words “Director or Deputy Secretary level officer of Spices Board” shall be substituted. 6. In sub-rule (3) of rule 12, for the word “Secretary”, the word “Director or Deputy Secretary level officer of Spices Board” shall be substituted. 7. In sub-rule (2) of rule 13, for the word “Chairman”, the word “Secretary” shall be substituted. 8. In rule 15, for sub-rule (1) , the following sub-rule shall be substituted, namely:- “The Secretary shall preside over the meetings of the ‘Executive Committee’. -- 9 of 10 -- 1 0 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART I I — S E C . 3(i)] ‘Research and Development Committee for Cardamom’ and ‘Market Development Committee for Spices’. In the absence of the Secretary, the Vice-Chairman, shall preside over the meetings of these committees and in the absence of Secretary and Vice-Chairman, the Director or Deputy Secretary level officer of the Spices Board shall preside over the meetings.” 9. In rule 16 of the said rules, for the word “Secretary” the word “Director or Deputy Secretary level officer of Spices Board” shall be substituted. [F.No. 5/10/2016-Plant- D] SANTOSH KUMAR SARANGI, Jt. Secy. Note:- The principal rules were published vide number GSR.673 (E) dated the 9th July, 1992 and last amended vide number GSR No. 116 (E), dated the 24th February 1994.
